title: Integration & QA Engineer — HEART4Victims
subtitle: VCPMS, a cloud case-management platform helping state agencies process crime-victim compensation claims.
impact: Why it matters: I own the integration test suites for a real, multi-tenant production system — Playwright E2E across Angular + .NET Core, covering OAuth/JWT auth, document management, and payment integrations, with automated API regression in Azure DevOps CI/CD.

title: Agricola Online
subtitle: Real-time multiplayer adaptation of the board game Agricola.
impact: Why it matters: a turn-based, room-per-match game is a genuine reason to reach for distributed systems — Go goroutines per game loop, WebSocket state sync, and Kubernetes that scales game servers with demand.

title: Job Dashboard
subtitle: Self-hosted job tracker: Gmail in, Claude classification, native macOS widget out.
impact: Why it matters: a complete system — an LLM in the classification loop with structured output, an event-sourced data model, OAuth integrations, a scheduler, and a native widget. Proof I can ship end-to-end.

title: Full-Stack Intern — Poseidon Aerospace
subtitle: Startup building unmanned seaplane drones for long-range maritime cargo and defense.
impact: Why it matters: shipped real flight-software infrastructure — RESTful APIs integrating flight telemetry with central databases, Python telemetry monitoring/automation on Linux (Grafana, Azure Monitor), and Docker + CI/CD for UAV dashboards.

title: Full-Stack Intern — HEART4Victims
subtitle: Earlier internship on the VCPMS claim-management platform.
impact: Why it matters: built a step-by-step online claim form with validation (fewer incomplete applications), payment APIs to the state's finance software (removing double entry), a secure SignalR messaging feature, and AWS environments via Terraform IaC.

title: B.S. Computer Science — UC Santa Cruz
subtitle: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. GPA 3.5.
impact: Foundations in algorithms, systems, and software engineering — alongside three concurrent industry roles.
